description: June is a product analytics service for tracking user, company, pageview, and event data from web and server applications. Its documentation focuses on sending analytics events into June from browser, React/Next.js, Node.js, Python, Ruby, or direct HTTP calls.
summary: June exposes a write-key-authenticated tracking HTTP API at `https://api.june.so/sdk` with documented endpoints for identify, group, track, and page events; its docs also list language SDK packages, but no separate public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI were found.
